given: Sentry metric issue chart loads an open period that can change the selected time range

should_find.finding: the metric issue chart fires its data request before the open period has loaded, so it can query the wrong time range and then issue a second request after the open period changes the range

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix b7d3f6c151fc77018e06d9205138a6234ab53f11. the metric issue chart fires its data request before the open period has loaded, so it can query the wrong time range and then issue a second request after the open period changes the range
